name: bob-the-buildooor
description: Standalone Cardano self-custody browser-extension wallet (CIP-30) built on @harmoniclabs/buildooor
comment: Exact-pinned versions (no ^): a key-handling extension minimizes supply-chain drift (CLAUDE.md §2). Bump deliberately. @harmoniclabs/buildooor: bump when the keepRelevant fix (PR#12) ships.
comment2: Supply-chain (T7.1): install scripts are blocked by default via .npmrc (ignore-scripts=true). Only the vetted esbuild native-binary build is allow-listed. After `npm ci`, run `npm run allow-scripts`.
